overview.description: MySQL Data-Driven Test with dynamic expected files
overview.name: MySQL Variations Test

mysql.comment: Create table and clear previous data for the current ID
Insert dynamic data to table for user id {{id}}
mysql.query: INSERT INTO test_news (id, title, category) VALUES ({{id}}, '{{title}}', '{{category}}');

mysql.comment: Read data from table using variations
mysql.query: SELECT id, title, category FROM test_news WHERE id = {{id}};
